case_title: WING JOM MA VS. ANTHONY AGUIRRE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. PLAINTIFF'S FRIEND LING YU INTERPRETS ENGLISH TO CANTONESE, CANTONESE TO ENGLISH ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, WING JOM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, ANTHONY PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT APPEARED. EXHIBITS RETAINED FOR BOTH SIDES FOR CASE 823351 ALSO USED FOR RELATED CASE 823353. COM: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK: SHAWNA VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, ANTHONY ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-13-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, ANTHONY
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-01-2010
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MA, WING JOM AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2008 - JUDGMENT.
